case_title: ANA ARGUMEDO VS. SHEK YAN YU et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO NOTICE OF SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARGUMEDO, ANA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-09-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-09-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST WILLIAM L. BERG, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-09-2004 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-24-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SUSAN LEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
